{{Infobox character
| name = Seshethkunaaz
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|rise on a cloud of golden sand}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[King of all Dragons|Monarch of Dragons]], [[Monarch]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, [[King of all Dragons|King of Dragons]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, Monarch of the eastern Ashwind continent}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, ancestor}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Seshethkunaaz Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Seshethkunaaz, also known as [[Sesh]], is the [[Monarch]] of Dragons and a powerful ruler on the eastern [[Ashwind continent]]. He governs a lawless jungle territory where strength is the primary law, and his followers maintain a notable tension with the [[Blackflame Empire]]. Though he is a [[dragon]], he has lived for centuries in human form, often appearing as a young boy with sandy hair and golden eyes. This preference for a human appearance is shared by certain gold [[dragons]] who value refined aesthetics and find that [[madra]] flows more smoothly through a human body. His history is marked by early hardship; born in the desert, he was an exile abandoned by his kind. He was eventually raised alongside a contractor as brothers, adopting the name [[Sesh]]. His early [[life]] was disrupted by violence involving his adoptive brother, which led to his family fleeing and the subsequent execution of that brother. As a formidable figure, Seshethkunaaz possesses immense power, capable of manifesting massive sandstorms and destroying structures with ease. He is characterized by an arrogant and serpent-like demeanor, yet he also acts as a patron to [[sacred artists]], offering approval and granting wishes to those who demonstrate true spirit.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is the [[Monarch]] of Dragons.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is the wandering [[King]] of Dragons and appears as a cloaked human boy with golden eyes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is the [[King]] of Dragons and [[Monarch]] of the eastern [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Seshethkunaaz is a [[dragon]] [[Monarch]] and an ancestor who appears as a thirteen-year-old boy with sandy hair, bright gold eyes, and a serpent-like smile. A figure of fear for [[Lindon]], the [[King]] of Dragons was seen lounging against a pillar in the audience chamber. After receiving a message from [[Reigan Shen]] via [[vital aura]], he whispered to Sophara and demonstrated the ability to rise upon a cloud of golden sand. Ultimately, Seshethkunaaz died without becoming a [[Remnant]] due to [[Penance]], an event felt by [[Northstrider]] from a hundred miles away.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is the [[King]] of Dragons and appears as a boy of approximately thirteen years old with sandy hair and bright gold eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] smiles like a serpent.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is a character [[Lindon]] fears.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is a [[Monarch]] and an ancestor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] was lounging against a pillar in the audience chamber.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] sent a message to [[Seshethkunaaz]] through [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] whispered to Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] can rise on a cloud of golden sand.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] died, which was felt by [[Northstrider]] from a hundred miles away.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seshethkunaaz]] was a [[dragon]] and a [[Monarch]] that did not become a [[Remnant]] due to [[Penance]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|As the [[Monarch]] and [[King]] of [[East Ashwind]], Seshethkunaaz ruled as the Dragon of the [[Wasteland]]. During his reign, he served as a leader who gathered and pooled the various supplies that remained following the [[Dread War]]. He is also recognized as the [[King]] of Dragons, and he eventually provided an [[Ancient Scale]] to [[Yan Shoumei]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is the [[King]] of [[East Ashwind]] and a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is a [[Monarch]] who pooled supplies left behind after the [[Dread War]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is the [[King]] of Dragons and a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is the Dragon of the [[Wasteland]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seshethkunaaz]] is a person from whom [[Yan Shoumei]] received an [[Ancient Scale]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“What do numbers mean to you?” Seshethkunaaz whispered.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Seshethkunaaz said, “You may stand,” The King of Dragons radiated obvious approval, his gold reptilian eyes warm.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
